AMENDED LAW AND MOTION, DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT, SUSTAINED AMENDMENT TO ORDER OF 08/31/98. DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED W/O LEAVE TO AMEND. THE COURT FINDS, AS A MATTER OF LAW, THE EMPLOYMENT CONTRACT WAS A CONTRACT "AT WILL". THE COURT FURTHER FINDS THAT THE DEFT DID NOT BREACH ANY DUTY OF GOOD FAITH AND OR FAIR DEALINGS W/PLTF. DEFT SHALL PREPARE ORDER.

REMITTITUR FILED REMITTITUR, THE ABOVE ENTITLED MATTER CAME ON FOR HEARING ON 3-12-99, IN CONNECTION WITH TRIAL COURT'S ORDER SUSTAINING DEFENDANT DEMURRER WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. THIS COURT FINDS THAT THE TRIAL COURT ERRED IN SUSTAINING DEFEND'S DEMURRER. ACCOR- DINGLY, THE JUDGMENT OF THE TRIAL COURT IS REVERSED. DEFENDANT HAS 20 DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER (3-24-99) TO FILE AN ANSWER.
